name: universal-brute-workpack
description: Universal Brute Workpack — a full-capability stdio-first Agent MCP workpack with configurable tools, memory fallback, and Agent pipeline orchestration.
changelog: 0.1.2: removes redundant worker.search and ships optional Codex companion skills.
changelogDetail: Keeps worker.analyze and worker.diff, removes the duplicate worker.search alias, documents fs.grep as the only file-content search tool backed by the local worker pool, and includes lightweight Codex skills under integrations/codex-skills for scenario-based UBW usage.
author: Yupeng Zhou
